title: Budget-Constrained Customer Seeking Flexibility
primary_situation: Customer values HailTrace but cannot afford current renewal terms right now.
customer_goal: Reduce immediate financial burden without fully losing access.
opening_line: I like the platform, but I just cannot make this renewal work at that price right now.
known_facts: Customer has used the service and sees value.
Cash flow is tight this month.
They want flexibility, not necessarily cancellation.
hidden_facts: They may accept split billing if explained clearly.
They have not fully reviewed lower-tier options.
They are more likely to stay if the rep shows understanding before selling.
likely_objections: We just do not have room in the budget.
I cannot commit to the full annual amount today.
allowed_resolution_paths: delayed restart date if policy allows
red_lines: Pushy upsell before acknowledging budget reality

difficulty_modifiers.medium: Customer is cautious and asks detailed payment questions.
difficulty_modifiers.hard: Customer is skeptical because they feel prior promises were unclear.

scoring_signals: Rep acknowledges value and budget pressure
Rep diagnoses whether issue is timing, amount, or plan fit
Rep presents approved flexibility options clearly
Rep does not invent discounts or policies
Rep closes on a concrete next step
